description: §38.13.3 — a single `Inserted` arm plus a wildcard `<_>` catch-all satisfies exhaustiveness over the synthesized RowChange, so E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE does NOT fire (paired positive-companion to channel-onchange-not-exhaustive). §38.13.3: `A wildcard _ arm is legal.`
rationale: §38.13.3: the `<onchange>` arms SHALL be exhaustive over RowChange's three variants — but a wildcard `<_>` catch-all satisfies exhaustiveness (reusing the §18 family). So a partial arm-set + wildcard is well-formed and E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE stays silent.
